name: phase-01-idea
prompt: A glowing lightbulb built from interconnected glowing nodes and tiny sticky notes, floating above an open notebook and a coffee cup, early-stage startup ideation and validation, hopeful and bright.

name: phase-02-brand
prompt: A designer's floating workspace with logo sketches, a rounded color-swatch palette, a typography specimen and a domain-name card on a screen, brand identity creation.

name: phase-03-infra
prompt: Clean isometric cloud servers connected by glowing DNS and CDN network lines to a globe, developer infrastructure and hosting foundation.

name: phase-04-mvp
prompt: A laptop where lines of code assemble into a simple app wireframe and buttons coming to life, building a minimum viable product, hands-on and energetic.

name: phase-05-design
prompt: A floating pixel-perfect design system: buttons, cards and toggles arranged on a grid with a ruler and color tokens, polished high-quality UI craftsmanship.

name: phase-06-security
prompt: A glowing padlock and a shield hovering over a stylized database cylinder with a fingerprint and key, secure authentication, data and encryption.

name: phase-07-launch
prompt: A friendly rocket on a launchpad beside a floating search bar and stacked content pages, product launch and SEO readiness, dawn sky.

name: phase-08-analytics
prompt: A sleek floating analytics dashboard with line charts, a conversion funnel and KPI tiles glowing on a dark panel, data and tracking.

name: phase-09-email
prompt: An open envelope releasing glowing connection lines that link a small crowd of diverse people, email newsletter and community retention, warm.

name: phase-10-growth
prompt: A soaring upward growth chart arrow rising over a cheering crowd of tiny people, a megaphone and floating social media heart and play icons, viral growth to ten thousand users.

name: phase-11-vc
prompt: Two hands shaking over a term-sheet document on a desk with an upward money graph and a golden coin stack in the background, venture capital funding success.
